_note: A SYNTHETIC pre-save-layer (v7) run save. v7 has no typed RunStep journal — its actionLog (if any) is the old display-only LoggedAction shape — so it CANNOT be replayed by the v8 engine. migrateRun(it, 7) MUST throw AbandonRun (docs/06 §3 STREAM-BREAKING). The exact fields below are illustrative; the loader never gets past the version gate.
